summary: Live/Archive | Hearing Speed Changes while Fast Forwarding
description:
GIVEN the user is watching a Live or Archive game
AND the TTS is enabled
AND the user is Fast Forwarding

steps.action: WHEN the user changes the Fast Forward Speed
steps.result:
THEN the user will hear: “Fast Forward <speed>"
For example: "Fast Forwarding 2x, Fast Forwarding 4x, Fast Forwarding 8x, press select to play"
